textByHash.022b0771d49c04402cc7328914e7e2dd332776e3: Grrrr, what business you got here?
textByHash.99b2142d9f174a4e9edf909352b89bab7cf089d5: So what you want with me?
textByHash.042cf4b7180be0ac220083ca752f3e66587537b0: I would like to see you try!
textByHash.8b22eec6f88bf50204941c3d2e7737e205105144: Is that so... You humour me small t'ing. Answer this riddle and I will help you...
textByHash.34a5acd16e525b7ad89cceb111a59f8663600a1f: I want you to bring me an item: I will give you all the letters of this item, you work out what it is...
textByHash.fa4339c48d891b82b33fd81993134c42e8bacdd9: My first is in days, but not in years, My second is in evil, and also in tears, My third is in all, but not in none, My fourth is in hot, but not in sun.
textByHash.bc746655c164d4e6b799e0527442cf504b46dcfe: My fifth is in heaven, and also in hate, My sixth is in fearing, but not in fate, My seventh is in plush, but not in place.
textByHash.9dad14a46628329274ea14be98ab8b7fccb71816: My eighth is in nine, but not in eight, My last is in earth, and also in great.
textByHash.188f10ec49db1820407176aa88a0af80b5f70ced: My whole is an object, that magic will make. It brings wrack and ruin to all in its wake... Now how long, I wonder, will this riddle take?
textByHash.35079bb0b2f6f8d7d24a427f6f31bdbbcc7e6da7: Hur, hur, hur... I see you haven't worked it out yet. Keep trying, imp.
textByHash.10aabdf59b7b0bc7cca6eb1eb8dc4da21d77238b: That is not what I want, imp!
textByHash.7c7587a7d0929754208772fe6f2035622fc0bfe4: Hur, hur. The imp has done it! This is what you be needing...
textByHash.66fd7555219e2defdaba2704f477dda3799f9772: Yes, what looks good on a plate with salad?
textByHash.4fd1aaa1bc3ca7f7f4daf25735d666aa346e7641: You! Now go, and bother me no more.)
textByHash.b8b1924e14f6be7844a776540a91b32e20fdca0d: Grr! Think you are a comedian, eh? Get lost!
textByHash.936cd531303e0ed40b45b758e2775c08231e9256: What's the point? Take this one and go away!
textByHash.ffbd63ea3adff45facdbccd4094c1cb47d8440a4: You imps always store things in places and forget. Go look for it.
textByHash.fd02e040465d9f6e886488e6c21921cb446c8086: Are you blind? What is that you are carrying?
textByHash.042f9e62e0c8f94776d29510c6d0eda7a0558f70: Grrrr, what business have you here ?
textByHash.c5ab12e6237e9385d6725fa3c3a5d1cf393328fd: So what do you want with me ?
textByHash.c14c8f89ba463ba5affd860babf34d5d516019e4: You humour me small thing, answer this riddle and I will help you... I want you to bring me an item
textByHash.354dbf95eef43ba53a5b7746feb0a38f383a72af: I will give you all the letters of this item, you work out what it is...
textByHash.77a0e1799aa5cc6eb4300031da2e1027310669b9: My first is in days, but not in years. My second is in evil, and also in tears. My third is in all, but not in none
textByHash.8d06745ea04180788e3f23973e8352e00124ba62: My fourth is in hot, but not in sun. My fifth is in heaven, and also in hate. My sixth is in fearing, but not in fate.
textByHash.6df0bc2f40ded4bad378d6a132f644d456c01520: My seventh is in plush, but not in place. My eighth is in nine, but not in eight. My last is in earth, and also in in great
textByHash.f27000ce0ebb995454febb13649fd45314bca3f4: My whole is an object, that magic will make. It brings wrack and ruin to all in it's wake...
textByHash.f8a81e113c230f439426b92588a371b85cf8ad20: Now how long I wonder, will this riddle take?
textByHash.900f09814a8418570abc90a1d4c152309bc9c28a: Well well.. the imp has done it!
textByHash.0cd5fc03081fe6eeb00e05ec8c99e29d1b6ab2db: This is what you be needing...
